productDisplayName: Converse Men Multi Coloured Flip Flop
description: Style Note converse refuses to be stereotyped as the brand that only makes canvas shoes. These rainbow hued flip flops celebrate summer with their colour happy tones on the footbed. Wear this with any off-duty ensemble to snazz up your outfit. Please note: stripe pattern is variable Product Details Rubber thong style straps with branding Rubber toe separator Multi-hued rubber footbed with printed branding Rubber outsole with terraced grooved Material and Care Rubber Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not store under direct sunlight
